title: Delete Asset
content:
# Delete Asset

Permanently delete an existing Asset. This cannot be undone once the API request has been submitted.

The data in the Asset /  Data Stream pairs is not deleted and can be recovered if you create the same Asset name again.

## Endpoint

`POST /assets/{asset_name}/delete`

code_examples.code:
from kelvin.api import Client

client = Client(api_key="your-api-key")
response = client.asset.deleteAsset()
print(response)

parameters.name: asset_name
parameters.description: Asset key `name` to delete. The string can only contain lowercase alphanumeric characters and `.`, `_` or `-` characters.
